training_status: previously active, currently unable to exercise due to fatigue

benefits.description: Reta improves sleep; tired at night, wakes at decent hour, clocking 6-8 hours
Lost weight on reta; regained 6 lbs when going off it
Noticed a massive difference in energy levels since starting GLP

side_effects.description: Depression and mood worsening attributed to GHKCU and/or GLP use
Little to no energy, difficult to muster strength to even go for a walk; was very active before

protocol_notes: OP went off reta for a few weeks, gained back 6 lbs, then returned at a very low dose (0.5 mg) to maintain appetite while keeping weight loss. Currently considering selank/semax to offset mood/fatigue side effects. Diet reported as mostly carbs (eggs, chicken, bagels, iced coffee, daily sweet treat).
